designRules.sceneScale: usually 1.1x to 1.6x the base actor width; rendered horizontal footprint must stay at or below 52px at the 96px QA size
exceptions: sleeping may use the user-approved hard-edged pixel Zzz sequence

states.name: Cushion Watch
states.action: Sit into the cushion, breathe, observe, and blink once.

states.name: Bedtime Pull
states.accessory: top-down bed and the shared blanket
states.action: Climb beside the bed and pull the blanket onto the mattress.

states.name: Top-down Sleep
states.accessory: top-down mattress, pillow, the same large blanket, and user-approved pixel Zzz
states.action: Lie flat on the pillow under the blanket; keep closed eyes and both claws visible while the blanket breathes and three Z shapes rise.

states.name: Morning Stretch
states.accessory: the same top-down bed and blanket
states.action: Stretch on the bed while the blanket slides toward the foot.

states.name: Puzzle Pause
states.action: Turn the final large puzzle piece, compare both sides, and pause before placing it.

states.name: Desk Shuffle
states.accessory: one broad low desk with two work tiles
states.action: Alternate both claws on the tiles, then pause to inspect.

states.name: Parcel Parade
states.accessory: one parcel, a floor path, and two helpers
states.action: Pass the parcel along the path and send both helpers onward.

states.name: Picnic Jar
states.accessory: one jar on a picnic mat
states.action: Twist twice, strain, then push the jar toward the owner.

states.name: Suitcase Fold
states.accessory: one open suitcase and one striped cloth
states.action: Fold the cloth progressively into the suitcase.

states.name: Mat Move-in
states.action: Unroll the mat and settle into the new workspace.

states.name: Cushion Cheer
states.action: Compress the cushion, hop, make both claws meet overhead, and settle.

states.name: Basket Rescue
states.action: Get covered by the basket, wriggle free, stand, and get nudged again.
